arts.ttl: Eredivisie Round up: PSV lose again as Van Persie’s Feyenoord debut ends in draw
arts.sum: There were four matches in the Eredivisie on Saturday and below is a round up of all the action. Utrecht 1-0 NAC Breda FC Utrecht finally ended their winless run in the Eredivisie with a narrow win over NAC Breda. The hosts dominated the first half but chances came and went with Nick Viergever, Jens […] The post Eredivisie Round up: PSV lose again as Van Persie’s Feyenoord debut ends in draw appeared first on Football Oranje.
